--[[ v1.0.0 https://wearedevs.net/obfuscator ]] return(function(...)local n={"\082\066\107\053\084\071\107\061","\118\052\069\112\106\066\057\077\099\043\053\061","\121\069\115\107\101\122\110\061";"\106\086\097\073\115\109\112\065\089\070\080\069\102\043\107\082\103\121\071\107\053\077\084\067\090\097\065\105\078\057\061\061","\107\076\049\098\066\051\055\083";"\067\065\113\109";"\089\120\048\055\105\107\106\052\121\090\061\061","\066\106\072\085\074\057\118\054\048\048\110\061";"\112\052\104\054","\071\082\080\083\049\083\112\089\109\082\108\079\100\080\088\098\049\057\061\061","\080\107\083\106\079\119\102\114\122\083\081\107\122\116\065\074","\090\101\102\075\109\104\113\121\067\110\061\061","\065\097\069\085\070\075\050\103\107\086\117\065";"\090\069\057\049\049\105\099\049","\070\043\108\116\090\113\057\116";"\065\056\081\122\102\057\111\116\056\068\061\061","\109\051\080\047\066\110\061\061";"\067\114\080\084\109\114\119\061";"\071\105\050\049\122\118\106\115\073\107\054\066\079\075\056\054\080\107\106\099\073\118\119\061","\090\101\102\077\109\076\050\097\043\079\080\108\043\051\055\121\043\119\087\112\071\079\117\089\066\051\055\047","\049\099\073\079\053\065\079\079\055\086\053\068\055\097\108\110\118\107\119\061";"\081\098\110\082\078\119\122\102","\043\101\108\088\067\114\116\120";"\121\065\108\066\066\098\048\108\065\113\103\061";"\067\114\080\048\066\057\061\061","\069\054\049\106","\077\065\078\115";"\076\050\107\071\078\102\113\106","\057\105\057\118\084\101\087\087\119\049\110\061","\080\065\086\120\116\068\099\053\120\054\090\100\122\070\107\100\077\112\118\098\085\097\056\066\112\085\097\053\072\118\085\069\116\102\057\061","\111\101\112\121\066\057\061\061","\069\105\043\103","\107\071\108\049\070\056\069\051\043\068\050\073\122\110\061\061";"\116\043\089\111";"\049\104\066\112\107\107\105\054\056\078\117\109\107\086\077\061";"\084\089\111\121\073\106\051\119\078\106\107\074\103\049\098\076","\100\105\070\108";"\114\118\122\097";"\053\074\104\076\077\085\051\107\078\057\061\061","\048\071\074\098\055\110\073\082\085\07 R(o)end,function(n,i)local R=F(i)local y=function(y,k,M)return m(n,{y,k,M},i,R)end return y end,function(n,i)local R=F(i)local y=function(...)return m(n,{...},i,R)end return y end,function(n)W[n]=W[n]-(776744-776743)if 326118+-326118==W[n]then W[n],C[n]=nil,nil end end,function(n,i)local R=F(i)local y=function(y,k)return m(n,{y,k},i,R)end return y end
